title: The for Loop
description: A compact loop with initialization, condition, and increment.

slides.title: for: The All-in-One Loop
for Loop Example
slides.content:
```php
<?php
for ($i = 1; $i <= 5; $i++) {
    echo "Number: $i\n";
}
?>
```
Output:
Number: 1
Number: 2
Number: 3
Number: 4
Number: 5
